message:
feat: formatResultSummary shows L1/L2 cache hit rates

Display per-DO (L1) and per-datacenter (L2) page cache hit rates
in the one-line summary. Complements the merge telemetry fix that
now propagates cacheHits/cacheMisses/edgeCacheHits/edgeCacheMisses
from fragment DOs through the merge layer.

Example: "20 rows in 3.2ms | L1: 8/10 hits | L2: 3/10 hits"
